title: SARIF AI emit profile — invocation object
description: Input contract for a fully-formed SARIF invocation an AI producer supplies to the add-invocation verb. An overlay on the canonical SARIF 2.1.0 invocation ($ref to the base shape, tightened for the AI profile). Notifications travel INLINE on toolExecutionNotifications/toolConfigurationNotifications. executionSuccessful, commandLine, and workingDirectory are required; the verb auto-stamps endTimeUtc and any unset notification timeUtc, so those are not required here.

executionSuccessful.description: Whether the process the invocation models completed successfully. Required by both SARIF §3.20.21 and the AI profile.

commandLine.description: The command line that launched the process this invocation models. Required by the AI profile (the natural identity of a launched process) even though SARIF §3.20.4 makes it optional.

workingDirectory.description: The directory the process ran in, as a SARIF artifactLocation. Required by the AI profile (it anchors relative paths in the scan) even though SARIF §3.20.19 makes it optional; the AI producer knows it. The uri must be a non-empty string.
